system.description:
(near, magical, reload) When you **_point the Red Scepter at an object of your hatred and erase 1 charge_**, roll +CHA: **on a 10+**, the Scepter deals 2d4 damage (*messy*, ignores armor), manifested as blistering burns; **on a 7-9**, as a 10+ but pick 1:
- Mark a consequence
- Spend a few seconds chanting and muttering before dealing damage
- Cause any exposed, combustible items in range to burst into flames

**On a 6-**, the GM says what happens (which may or may not involve marking a consequence).

When you **_mark 3 Consequences_**, you gain Fanning the Flames.

success.value: the Scepter deals 2d4 damage (*messy*, ignores armor), manifested as blistering burns

failure.value: the GM says what happens (which may or may not involve marking a consequence).
